name: Sara Lee's Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: ½ pound Real butter or margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Spray an 8-½ inches Pyrex loaf dish with Pam.
3. Cream butter with sugar on high speed of mixer for 5 minutes.
4. Add 1 egg and then a little flour, beating for 2 minutes.
5. Add 2nd egg and half of the remaining flour, beating for 2 minutes.
6. Add sour cream, the rest of the flour, and extract, beating for 2 minutes.
7. Spread batter evenly in dish.
8. Bake for 65 minutes or until a tester comes out clean.
9. Remove from dish.
10. Slice into ½-inch thick pieces.
11. Be sure to slice before freezing the loaf.
12. Thaw to use within 6 months.
